description: An agent must analyze shipping data to recommend a more optimal distribution center location.

nodes.task_description: Load a dataset of all shipment destinations (as lat/long coordinates) for the past year.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully loads the location data.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the geographic center of all shipment destinations (center of gravity analysis).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly calculates the optimal coordinates for a new distribution center.

nodes.task_description: Recommend the city closest to the calculated geographic center as the ideal location for the new distribution center.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a clear and data-driven location recommendation.
